dependencies.name: libxcb
dependencies.reason: The toolkit-neutral X11 adapter directly uses system core XCB for checked connection setup, fixed atom interning, bounded property reads, verified EWMH discovery, and observational root events.

dependencies.name: xorg-server
dependencies.fallback: A separately controlled X server may run the same transport integration binary.
dependencies.reason: The deterministic integration harness starts Xvfb through its displayfd interface with server reset disabled and exercises transport, property, EWMH, and root-event behavior without requiring a window manager.

unresolved.reason: Supported minimum libxcb and Xorg server versions remain unmeasured; the recorded versions are observations from the Gentoo reference VM.
Standard window-manager requests, dock and strut properties, stale task-model records, and RandR output policy remain later PD1 work.
